flavourText: A shimmering giant built from line, tone, and colour. Master the elements to shatter its form.
Nothing escapes its gaze. Prove your observational skills to blind its many eyes.
Haunts the halls of art history. Name the masters and their methods to banish it.
A whirring machine of endless refinement. Feed it experiments to power it down.
Each head wields a different medium. Cut them all with your technical knowledge.
A mirror of your creative soul. Only authentic personal expression can calm its storm.
Cycles through art history at dizzying speed. Pin it to the right era to slow it down.
A towering figure counting down the clock. Plan wisely and work with purpose to defeat it.
